reviews.review_description: It's such a pity that this game doesn't get the love it deserves. I used to own an arcade and had "Gun Bullet" (Overseas version of "Point Blank"). LOVED that game. This game is basically the same game but better (I wasn't enough of an expert to tell if super precise aiming is an issue).

Hoping multiplayer is on the way.
As it will really complete the game

Can’t wait to see what the full release holds, hoping it hasn’t been abandoned. 

Only criticism I have for it right now is hopefully a way to turn off the guns flicky recoil animation, it makes using the sights impossible on ones where you have to spam, as well as it just looks dumb imo. I feel the only animation the gun needs is the slide moving back when you shoot but with the gun itself staying still.  

But the mini games themselves are fun and there’s good variety and includes ones from point blank

developer_response.body:
TocRum we just launched our full release, and you're not going to be disappointed!

We'll try to add an option in the settings to remove the gun flick. Thanks so much for the suggestion. We've added a bunch of minigames, and overhauled the progression systems too, I hope you like all the new content!

reviews.review_description:
This is a really cool game - love the graphics and overall concept. The bug with left-handed mode has been fixed, thank you Devs!

The one suggestion I may add is putting a timer on the screen. 

The new update is great. Really pleased with this one and addicted to the mini-games. 5 stars

developer_response.body: Noted! We'll be putting a timer on screen, we've had that feedback a few times. Thanks grecocity.

reviews.review_description: Is not 5 stars because i doesnt support Multiplayer

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the Review Randy!

We're hopeful that the game does well enough now that it's in full release for us to re-invest in adding multiplayer. It's been something we've known would make an amazing addition to the game from day one.

reviews.review_description:
Very fun game, like many have said reminds me of point blank when I was younger.
2 flaws for me, one I'm left handed and whenever change to this in settings the gun goes no where near you so have to close the game and re open it and play right handed.
2nd is when the game loads your facing away from the menu in a different position. Never had this happen on any other game. So have to take headset off and move back to playing position which takes a few trys. I emailed developer about this several weeks ago without reply. Other than that great game I recommend.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your review, and I'm sorry that we missed your email!
We'll look into those two issues and hopefully get those sorted in time for our next update.

reviews.review_description:
Really awesome and fun Point Blank lookalike game!
For the devs, there are 2 crucial things that are missing.

- is there a possibility to add a visual timer with each mini game? (Not just only the last 3/5 seconds sound countdown)

- Coop play! To play with a friend online at the same time. Or/and a hot seat local mode where you play together with a friend(s) with the same mini games, where you have to switch the vr glasses would be awesome and really fun! (Like a party game)

developer_response.body:
Eggbom8 you're on point with your suggestions.

We'd love to add a multiplayer mode. It's by far the most requested feature and we're really hoping the game does well now that it's out of early access, so that we can add this feature. 

We've added a lot since you last played too, so even without multiplayer, I'd encourage you to jump back in and give it a go!

reviews.review_description: Great game, excellent developers, super FUN, I will recommend the game to all my friends! 10/10 child loves it :-) add a way to play the game in mixed reality as if you were in a target shooting range

developer_response.body:
Hey Gergo!

We'd love to add a mixed reality mode, too! It would be a great feature. Recommending will help enable us to add new modes like mixed reality!

Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description:
the game is very cool with a lot of minigames, but a little request for the developers:

Can you please fix the camera bug on Meta Quest?
Is annoying to have to switch to stationary boundaries to play your game
If I have the headset on roomscale boundaries, the game world is 90 degrees on the left and I cannot reset the angle, it work great if you set the boundaries as stationary

developer_response.body:
Hey Marco,

Just wanted to thank you for your request, and let you know that we've just released a patch to fix this problem. Thanks again for playing, and for leaving your review.

reviews.review_title: I give it a B minus
reviews.review_description: If you’re looking for a very cartoony and light shooting challenge game then this is it. If you’re looking for something that is truly challenging this ain’t it. Even on expert mode I’m able to shoot most of the items while holding my controller near my waste. It’s fun for a bit but once you’ve played through all the different scenarios a few times it gets boring.

developer_response.body:
Hey TooPok,

Thanks for your feedback. We agree with you, and we're working on some great stuff for the full release, and we hope you come back and try the new format. We think you're really gonna like what we're putting togeather.

reviews.review_description:
If you are order than 35 you have to buy this game!
Seriously, when we bought meta quest we were dreaming this game, next step time crisis and house of the Dead

The game is awesome and is just like Point Blank, which was back in the day on PS1. 
Unfortunately the rankings do not work correctly and the name is not displayed under "Global". This is very annoying because the game is ultimately all about the high score.
A co-op mode would also be desirable - that was always the best thing about Point Blank.

Edit: thank you so much! I set my name in the settings and the rankings work now, but I have a new issue: the screen is always fixed, its not possible to re-center it. In my case I have to stand inside my couch, head against a wall to be in the center of the game.

developer_response.body: Hey LordValFromHell! Thanks for your review and feedback. Just wanted to reach out to see what happened with your score. Have you entered your name in the settings? This will update the name on the leaderboard.

reviews.review_description:
The game is absolutely on point! The games balance and strategy  keep things fresh and engaging, making every match feel unique and challenging whilst rewarding your skills. 
The dynamics between different strategies and mini games and the depth of gameplay options really improves the experience and gives lots of playability. The devs did a great job creating a game that keeps players on their toes and constantly evolving their tactics!  Well done

developer_response.body: Thankyou for your review Merlin! We set out to do exactly what you're describing, but we also have a long way to go! Stay tuned for more minigames and features throughout early access. Thanks so much for playing, and leaving your review.

reviews.review_description: This game scratched an itch

developer_response.body:
Sounds like we've done our job and hit the mark with this one then!

If you get the chance, try the game again now that we're out of early access! We've added a lot of content.

reviews.review_title: Great start for lovers of point blank.
reviews.review_description:
Having spent so much money on the arcade machine to the extent of almost buying one second hand, the early access is aimed perfectly for me. 

For those who haven't played point blank it is a fun shooting game without the killing or over complicated realistic gun types of other shooting games. It is just quick fire fun mini games testing accuracy, rapid fire and quick target identification. 

The gun aim is accurate which for the game is a necessity and the force feedback does well to replicate the arcade machine especially in those rapid fire rounds.

The mini games either replicate the classic games with a few extra ones which I don't know but fit the vibe of the game. 

The developers seem to know the exact tone to go for which includes the sound effects, music and aesthetics. 

As early access I did expect it would be even better in the future with the only bug being sometimes i can't reset view using the oculus button so sometimes have to shuffle your standing point to match the game.

Ideally changes would be showing the time left and targets remaining in some games while you are shooting. The dream would be online play so 2 players can do the same stages at the same time and fight out for that one leaf or even just a  pass and play mode to compare scores against the same rounds. 

Really looking for the final version but even now it is great fun and a pleasure to play!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing the game Dohster! We hear you about adding the timer and targets remaining. These are great feature requests. 

Sorry to hear the Occulus button isn't always resetting your view properly! I'll log a bug report and have the team look into it. If you have any further context about what causes this, please reach out on the discord and we'll work with you to get it fixed.

reviews.review_description: I had to pick this up and support these devs. PB was my favorite arcade gun game and this is well on its way to nailing that formula. Already having a ton of fun and I can't wait for 1.0!

developer_response.body: Thanks Harvey! We also loved PB and have a lot we still want to add to the experience if the game does well. Your support means the world to us.

reviews.review_description:
The first 30 minutes felt almost like the original. A little more sweet and funny moments and the game becomes incredibly great!

I'm just worried about my Controller 😅🫣

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing ChilikingSW! 

And trust us, those quest controllers are sturdy! Hit that trigger as fast as you can and you'll have that high score for sure.

reviews.review_description:
This game is brilliant if you liked Point Blank Shooting feels great and fast just like it used to with the same aiming and rhythm..Great game already early on..hope its worked on and improves  on it .brilliant and worth it now.
It would be great if the stages had their own high score and be shown for the level you just completed..would make it more competitive..and a fireworks end stage..also protube provolver support would be great and bhaptics
Good little game, lots of different levels. Would recommend it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks Good Game!

We've just released even more! We're now at 115 distinct minigames. We've overhauled the progression system too. If you get the chance, jump back in and give the new ones a go!

reviews.review_description:
Fun shooting game that arcade dwellers of yesteryear have been waiting for.
Happy to confirm gun accuracy is good so peripheral vision can be used just like the old Point Blank games..
Enjoyed additions like the "shoot carefully" and "memorise the pattern" sections and "falling apples " is fun.
Quest 3 resolution less than PC demo I was playing but bought this for portability. Perfect game to show to family and friends for young and old alike to play..as us VR owners try to sell more headsets..
No doubt will be an awesome sobriety tester!
Ultimately waiting for local co-op..or for even more fandome..dual wielding like when someone would leave their game and you took their gun to play two at once at the arcade.
One suggestion however for developers...for extra accessibility..instead of going into the menu to choose left or right handed..how about it auto detects based on what controller and trigger is pressed..that will help with the demo-ing.

developer_response.body: This hand detection feature is a great suggestion Morpheus. We'll add it to the backlog for discussion when we're planning the next round of features.
